UsageCost: Free charging for 2hours then charging stopsIdle fee ($/min) = $0.50c / minuteIdle fee grace period (minutes) = 15 minutesIdle fees begin only after charging is complete and the grace period has ended

AddressInfo.Title: The Link - Ginninderry Community & Information Centre

Connections.Comments:
Step 1: Tap the QR code symbol on the bottom right of the app
Step 2: Scan the QR code on the yellow Exploren sticker
Step 3: Read the charger description and press “Start Charging”
Step 4: Plug the cable to your vehicle
Step 5: Plug the cable to the charger
Step 6: If you want to stop the session during the charge, simply press “Stop Charging from the app”
